title: Senior Teacher - MBD Group Global Group - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - MBD Group Global Group - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Join the MBD Group Global Group family as a Senior Teacher in Nagpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About MBD Group Global Group:
MBD Group Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MBD Group Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
